---
title: "Different treatment modalities for advanced laryngeal cancer: improvement of oncological outcomes after tumor board implementation"
date: 2025-01-01
author:
  - name: Rodrigues, Mariana Gonçalves
  - name: Ramos, Daniel Marin
  - name: De Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Lin, Chin Shien
  - name: Takahashi, Jorge Tomio
  - name: Chamel, Tiago Wanderley Diniz
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Clinics"
  volume: 80
  doi: "10.1016/j.clinsp.2025.100836"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Different treatment modalities for advanced laryngeal cancer: improvement of oncological outcomes after tumor board implementation</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
